title: Build Validator-B pipeline
objective: Add a repeatable Validator-B pipeline using Gemini CLI that mirrors the existing Validator-A automation while preserving Tier 3 validator independence.
scope: Add a Validator-B runner script and package command.
Add secret preflight and resource-failure handling consistent with Validator-A.
Update harness audits and guides so Validator-B is discoverable and enforced.
Add dry-run or fixture validation for the new pipeline.
success_criteria: scripts/run-validator-b.mjs exists and can execute in dry-run mode without invoking Gemini.
Validator-B runner writes normalized run metadata and result artifacts under tasks/handoffs/{TASK-ID}/.
Validator-B runner rejects handoffs with agent values other than Validator-B.
Validator-B runner performs the same common secret-like payload preflight as Generator and Validator-A before invoking a model CLI.
Harness audit includes Validator-B pipeline checks.
Relevant guides or state documents no longer imply Validator-B is missing after implementation.
node --check and npm run audit:harness pass.
constraints: Do not include API keys, tokens, credentials, or PII in files, logs, reports, or command output.
Do not pass Validator-A result content into Validator-B handoffs.
Do not perform a main merge without required validation and completion records.
Keep implementation style aligned with scripts/run-validator-a.mjs.
